scripts.build:apps: pnpm run build:mobile && pnpm run build:web
scripts.build:packages: pnpm run build:api && pnpm run build:shared && pnpm run build:ui && pnpm run build:editor
scripts.build:mobile-release: pnpm run build:packages && pnpm run build:mobile
scripts.build:all: pnpm run build:packages && pnpm run build:apps
scripts.clean:all: rm -rf apps/tlon-web/node_modules && rm -rf apps/tlon-mobile/node_modules && rm -rf packages/shared/dist && rm -rf packages/shared/node_modules && rm -rf packages/ui/dist && rm -rf packages/ui/node_modules && rm -rf node_modules && rm -rf packages/editor/dist && rm -rf apps/tlon-web-new/node_modules && rm -rf packages/api/node_modules && rm -rf packages/api/dist
scripts.deps:ios: cd apps/tlon-mobile/ios && bundle install && bundle exec pod install
scripts.dev:ios: concurrently "pnpm run dev:shared" "pnpm --filter 'tlon-mobile' dev" "pnpm --filter 'tlon-mobile' ios" "pnpm --filter '@tloncorp/ui' watch"
scripts.dev:ios:preview: concurrently "pnpm run dev:shared" "pnpm --filter 'tlon-mobile' dev" "pnpm --filter 'tlon-mobile' ios:preview" "pnpm --filter '@tloncorp/ui' watch"
scripts.test: npm rebuild better-sqlite3 && pnpm run -r test run -u
scripts.test:ci: npm rebuild better-sqlite3 && pnpm build:api && pnpm run -r test run
